title: The Ones by Halos1
lyrics: [Music] I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got a voice in the dark, sayin' it's worth mine, got the silence of noise, but it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, sayin' it more than that, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, got the voice in the dark, peace to the line, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, I'm a black shit in the mirror, peace to the line, I [Music] I got a war in my chest and it's out. [Outro] And it's pulling me back to you It's back to you Pulling me right back to you I'm falling into the noise again Oh, kick out. Give me a break. Oh, shit. Give me a break, buddy. You got a break? Give me a bag. What? Yes, a peck ain't gonna smoke.
